response.original_title: How do I escalate a problem with Expedia ⟿ Expert Support 24/7
response.overview: To escalate an Expedia issue, first call customer service at【�＋〚１〛　+1-877 (664) 5221】 (US) and explicitly request a supervisor transfer if the initial agent cannot resolve the problem. For escalated issues【�＋〚１〛　+1-877 (664) 5221】 (US), prepare detailed documentation, including your itinerary number, and ask for the supervisory desk. To escalate an issue with Expedia 【�＋〚１〛　+1-877 (664) 5221】 (US), travelers can contact support and request escalation to a supervisor for faster resolution of problems related to Expedia hotel booking, flight reservations, cancellations, or refund delays.
